summary: Moving Quote AI Enhancement - FULLY WORKING. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified - multi-step wizard, real cost calculations, AI-powered tips with Claude integration. All APIs are REAL (not mocked).
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/moving/pricing-info - returns pricing configuration with AI features
Backend: POST /api/moving/quote - generates quote with real pricing calculations
Backend: POST /api/moving/quote?include_ai_tips=true - includes AI tips with quote response
Backend: POST /api/moving/quote/{id}/ai-tips - gets AI tips for existing quote
Backend: GET /api/moving/quote/{id} - retrieves existing quote by ID
Backend: 404 returned for non-existent quotes
Backend: Special items surcharges calculated correctly (piano $300, pool table $250, etc.)
Backend: Floor surcharges applied when no elevator ($50 per floor)
Backend: Packing service adds ~40% to base cost
Backend: Storage monthly costs calculated based on home size
Backend: Distance calculations using Haversine formula between Vancouver areas
Backend: Truck size determined by home size (studio/1br=small, 2br/3br=medium, 4br+/house=large)
Backend: Crew size assigned based on truck size (2/3/4 professionals)
Frontend: Moving Quote page loads with 3-step wizard
Frontend: Step 1 - Moving Details form with origin/destination, floor, elevator, date, home size
Frontend: Step 2 - Additional Services with special items, packing, storage options
Frontend: Step 3 - Quote display with price range, distance, hours, truck, crew info
Frontend: AI Moving Assistant expandable section present
Frontend: AI tips include summary paragraph
Frontend: Money-Saving Tips section with 3 tips displayed
Frontend: Pre-Move Checklist section with 5 items displayed
Frontend: Moving Day Tips section with 3 tips displayed
Frontend: About Your New Area (neighborhood_info) displayed
Frontend: Best Time to Move (timing_advice) displayed
Frontend: New Quote and Book This Move buttons working
critical_code_review_comments: AI integration uses emergentintegrations with Claude Sonnet 4.5 - REAL, not mocked
Moving quote service properly calculates costs using: base hourly rate, distance, floor surcharges, special items, packing multiplier, storage
Distance calculation uses Haversine formula with Vancouver area coordinates
MongoDB _id properly excluded from responses using projection
Frontend properly uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from environment
data-testid attributes present on key form elements for testing
seed_data_creation: Multiple moving quotes created during testing
